'''[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Wes Gevar''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Ultra-Light Assault Vehicle|ULAV]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed at [[Karinda Outpost]]. He met with a group of rebels who came to the planet to deliver much needed supplies, but was shot by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scout trooper/Legends|biker scout]] and wounded so badly that he could not participate in the fight to the base, but managed to survive.<ref name="Milk Run" />
